experience.description: Led a team in developing an application for product details recognition and expiration date management, implementing YOLOv11 for label detection and fine-tuning multiple OCR models.
Developed a Vietnamese OCR system using a ResNet–Transformer architecture, trained and evaluated models, and deployed for experimentation.
Collaborated in an Agile team to develop a C# desktop application for dental clinics, designing UX/UI and implementing core features for patient records and scheduling.
Engineered a complete C# attendance management system from scratch, integrating Google Sheets for data management and automating the attendance process.
